fields.name: Is_the_Company_regulated_by_any_government_agency
fields.fieldText: Is the Company regulated by any government agency?

fields.name: Is_there_more_than_1_Shareholder_with_25_Ownership_Interest
fields.fieldText: Is there more than 1 Shareholder with > 25% Ownership Interest?

fields.name: Does_the_largest_shareholder_own_less_than_25_of_the_company
fields.fieldText: Does the largest shareholder own less than 25% of the company?

fields.name: List_of_Shareholders_with_25_Ownership_Interest_Will_be_verified_via_corporate_d
fields.fieldText: List of Shareholders with > 25% Ownership Interest - Will be verified via corporate documentation.

fields.name: Source_of_Wealth_of_Owners_with_25_Ownership_Interest
fields.fieldText: Source of Wealth of Owners with > 25% Ownership Interest

fields.name: Has_your_organisation_transacted_with_another_liquidity_venue_in_the_prior_30_da
fields.fieldText: Has your organisation transacted with another liquidity venue in the prior 30 days? If so, where?

value.stringValue: Email Address for Records and Notifications

fields.name: FileRequired
fields.fieldText: * Bank Statement is Required

value.stringValue: Upload a Copy of the Bank Statement

fields.name: DT2
fields.fieldText:
By signing and returning this form, I/we confirm for and on behalf of the applicant that:


  • I have read, understood and accurately completed the application form to open a trading account.
  • I have received, read and understand the Lydiam Group Ltd Professional Electronic Trading Agreement and all other agreements herein.
  • I have read and understand the nature and risks of the products intended to trade through this account.


As the applicant, I have authorization to act on all matters regarding opening and operating the trading account with Lydiam Group including but not limited to deposits, withdrawals, trading and investment instruments.

fields.name: ThankYouText
fields.fieldText:
r



Thank you.

Your application has been submitted.
